article.title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
article.summary: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.

headline: US Lawmakers Probe 2 Crypto Firms Over Insider Trades

article.title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
article.summary: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

headline: Cava Stock Surges 5% on Margin Expansion

article.title: Cava CEO: Unique Cuisine Differentiates Us
article.summary: Cava CEO Bret Schulman discusses the success of his restaurant and just what distinguishes them from the competition. He talks about the Mediterranean cuisine that distinguishes his brand. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: WWE Rival AEW Faces $1B Market Test

article.title: AEW CEO on WWE Challenger’s Biggest Test in New York
article.summary: All Elite Wrestling CEO Tony Khan discusses the future of AEW. He discusses his upcoming event, and how he plans to promote his league in the future. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Bitcoin Reserve Target Slashed to 1M, 20Y Lockup
